title: Trump orders Navy to 'shoot and kill any boat' laying mines in Hormuz Strait
summary_full: Trump's post shows the U.S. ratcheting up tensions with Iran over the strait, which has been largely choked off to oil tanker traffic since the war began.
summary_public: Trump's post shows the U.S. ratcheting up tensions with Iran over the strait, which has been largely choked off to oil tanker traffic since the war began.
